title: Live staged link live LLM opt-in proof (per-step)
problem: Staged spine uses mock LLM for link after live OpenAlex ingest. Pre-ticket-207 GO defines a per-step live Ollama link proof on rank-1 staged source with mock extract upstream.
acceptance_criteria: Live staged link fallthrough bypasses staged-fetch auto-mock when env gate set.
Opt-in pytest (live_network + live_smoke) proves discover→ingest→mock extract→live link on temp DB.
Default pytest and staged orchestrator remain mock-only.
non_goals: Live extract + live link in same pytest.
rollback_plan: Revert fallthrough gate, test, and ci deselect entry.
category: Phase 3 / live LLM / staged spine product-risk
